message:
fix(frankenterm/main): rebrand two config-path references from wa to ft (ft-wn3yc)

Two doc-comment references that were missed in the main branding pass:

- ConfigCommands (the config subcommand's `--path` help text):
  "default: ./ft.toml or ~/.config/wa/ft.toml" → ".../ft/ft.toml"
  This is what shows up under `ft config --help` and is the only
  hint the CLI surfaces about where the config file lives on disk.

- handle_config_command fallback path resolution comment:
  "fallback to ~/.config/wa/ft.toml" → ".../ft/ft.toml"
  The string literal that built the fallback path was already
  correct (uses ~/.config/ft/ft.toml); only the preceding comment
  described the old location, so the code was behaviorally correct
  and the comment was a pure documentation drift.

Pair commit with the config.rs + email_notify.rs rebrand landing in
bd6b39da. No runtime behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
